testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.sse.PlaylistEventPublisherTest

testcase.name: publishPlaylistUpdated delegates failure handling to registry — bad emitter is purged()
publishPlaylistUpdated broadcasts to every emitter for the target device()
publishPlaylistUpdated rejects blank deviceId on typed overload()
publishPlaylistUpdated is a no-op when no emitters are registered()
publishPlaylistUpdated tags the event as PLAYLIST_UPDATE and carries the payload()
publishPlaylistUpdated does not deliver to other devices()
publishPlaylistUpdated Any-overload forwards arbitrary JSON-shaped payloads()
publishPlaylistUpdated reads emitters from the registry on every call()
publishPlaylistUpdated rejects blank deviceId on Any overload()

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-02T23:50:33.400+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.adsignage.sse.SseEmitterRegistry : SSE register: device=device-with-broken-listener totalEmittersForDevice=1 2026-05-02T23:50:33.400+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.adsignage.sse.SseEmitterRegistry : SSE register: device=device-with-broken-listener
